input.company_description: AI-powered digital marketing platform built specifically for automotive dealerships. Automates Google Ads, social media, and inventory-based landing pages. 45 employees in Minneapolis. Serves 300+ dealership rooftops. Competes with Dealer.com and CDK Digital Marketing.

pain_points: competing against Dealer.com and CDK who bundle with DMS platforms
scaling from 300 rooftops in a market dominated by platform incumbents
proving ROI of AI-driven ad automation to dealership GMs who are skeptical of tech
expected_output.reasoning: Vertical SaaS selling to car dealerships is a niche market with specialized dynamics. Not a service business, not the right buyer persona, and dealership outbound requires industry-specific channels.
